description: Apple App Builder hooks — Swift command validation, SwiftLint auto-fix, and agent context injection

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'case "{}" in *.swift) which swiftlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftlint lint --fix --path "{}" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"Project targets: Swift 6.2, macOS .v26, iOS 26. Enforce @MainActor isolation on UI code. Prefer @Observable over ObservableObject. Use Liquid Glass APIs where applicable."}}'
